title: 水水的勇敢滑一下
subtitle: 初夏公园里的快乐早晨
moral: 被陪着玩很安心，自己试一试也会发现：我可以！

pages.narration: 初夏的早晨，风凉凉的，树叶沙沙响。水水和爸爸妈妈一起来到公园游乐场，水水的小脚都想跑起来。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 我们先去看看新玩具吧。

pages.composition_hint: white rabbit in a pink dress, red panda in a white t-shirt, and an adult white rabbit in a yellow floral dress walking together side by side toward a park playground entrance, trees and colorful play structures behind them, all standing and smiling

pages.narration: 游乐场里有一个彩色的六边形攀爬洞，一格一格的，像小蜜蜂的家。水水伸出小手，想钻进去探险。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 爸爸，这里可以钻进去吗？

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 可以，我们慢慢走，找到出口。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui reaching toward a colorful modular honeycomb climbing structure, large hexagonal tunnel blocks, bright plastic panels, crawl-through holes, red panda standing nearby on a soft playground floor

pages.narration: 水水跟着爸爸，爬一爬，钻一钻，钻过一个个六边形小洞，又从圆圆的洞口探出头。新玩具真不错，水水笑得眼睛弯弯。

dialogue.speaker: papa
dialogue.text: 水水的小鼻子真会探险。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda climbing through a colorful modular honeycomb climbing structure, large hexagonal tunnel blocks, bright plastic panels, crawl-through holes, peeking out of a hexagonal hole

pages.narration: 接着，水水看见最喜欢的彩虹大滑道。一条条彩虹垫子铺在绿绿的山坡上，好像在说：来呀，滑下来呀！
pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda seated together in a round inflatable tube at the top of a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill

pages.narration: 呼——坐进圆圆的充气圈，顺着彩虹滑道往下冲，风从耳朵边跑过去。水水紧紧坐好，心里扑通扑通，又怕又想笑。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda sitting in a round inflatable tube sliding down a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill, joyful faces and motion

pages.narration: 滑到坡底，水水稳稳停下，咯咯笑个不停。后来，妈妈也陪水水滑了一次，水水知道：有人陪着，真安心。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 坐稳啦，耳朵也跟着飞起来喽。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 妈妈，我们再滑一次一样快吗？

pages.composition_hint: shuishui and white rabbit at the bottom of a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill

pages.narration: 妈妈指了指旁边一条短一点的彩虹滑道。水水的小耳朵动了动，心里有一点点紧张。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 水水，要不要自己试试这条短一点的？

pages.composition_hint: shuishui in a pink dress standing and looking up at a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill, an adult white rabbit in a yellow floral dress standing beside her pointing toward the slide, both smiling

pages.narration: 水水一步一步走上小坡，自己坐进充气圈里。她吸一口气，小手抓住圈圈。

dialogue.speaker: mama
dialogue.text: 慢慢来，我在下面看着你。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui sitting in a round inflatable tube at the top of a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill, white rabbit standing at the landing area

pages.narration: 咕噜咕噜，充气圈顺着彩虹滑道滑下去啦！短短的一下，亮亮的一下，水水自己成功了。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 我滑下来啦！我自己滑的！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui in a round inflatable tube arriving at the bottom of a colorful outdoor rainbow dry tubing slide on an artificial grass slope, covered with rainbow-colored sliding mats, riders sitting in round inflatable tubes sliding down from the top of the hill, white rabbit watching with warm encouragement

pages.narration: 玩过滑梯，水水和爸爸换上防水服，来到一个超大的浅水池。池子里，小金鱼一闪一闪，游得飞快。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 准备好啦，小金鱼等等我！

pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda wearing rain overalls, each holding a small fishing net beside a shallow fish pond

pages.narration: 小金鱼左一闪，右一闪，水水和爸爸追来追去。一次捞到一条，有两次一下捞到两条，水水数得很认真。
pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda looking at a clear bucket with small goldfish, nets and gentle splashes nearby

pages.narration: 午饭时间到了。水水把小鱼都倒回池子里，和金鱼说拜拜，也和这个凉快的早晨说拜拜。

dialogue.speaker: shuishui
dialogue.text: 小金鱼，拜拜！下次再一起玩。

pages.composition_hint: shuishui and red panda releasing goldfish back into a shallow pond, sunny park playground in the distance
